content_blocks.text:
पाण्डुदोषजलदोषकामिला पीनसादिरमणक्रितामयः ।
कालिकासु रसुवासिनीगणैराकुलं च कुरुते तु चन्द्रमाः ॥ ७६ ॥

verse_data.sanskrit_text:
पाण्डुदोषजलदोषकामिला पीनसादिरमणक्रितामयः ।
कालिकासु रसुवासिनीगणैराकुलं च कुरुते तु चन्द्रमाः ॥ ७६ ॥

content_blocks.text:
The Moon (when malefic) causes
trouble by means of diseases generally brought on by
venereal indulgence, such as pallor, catarrh, jaundice
and inflammation of the nose, and also with the aid of
numerous female goblins and demonesses

verse_data.translation:
The Moon (when malefic) causes
trouble by means of diseases generally brought on by
venereal indulgence, such as pallor, catarrh, jaundice
and inflammation of the nose, and also with the aid of
numerous female goblins and demonesses

content_blocks.text:
Mars (when malefic) quickly causes
fear by a swelling of the scrotum. phlegm, weapons, fire,
knotty tumours, boils and such diseases as are born of
indigence; and also through the instrumentality of
Siva's heroic hosts and the terrific forms of that deity.

verse_data.translation:
Mars (when malefic) quickly causes
fear by a swelling of the scrotum. phlegm, weapons, fire,
knotty tumours, boils and such diseases as are born of
indigence; and also through the instrumentality of
Siva's heroic hosts and the terrific forms of that deity.

content_blocks.text:
Mercury (when malefic) works much
misery by producing wind imperceptibly in the regions
of the privities and the stomach, by bringing on leprosy,
indigestion, colic, diarrhoea and other diseases ; and also
through the instrumentality of spirits, the devoted ser-
vants of Vishnu of whom the leader is called Budha

verse_data.translation:
Mercury (when malefic) works much
misery by producing wind imperceptibly in the regions
of the privities and the stomach, by bringing on leprosy,
indigestion, colic, diarrhoea and other diseases ; and also
through the instrumentality of spirits, the devoted ser-
vants of Vishnu of whom the leader is called Budha

content_blocks.text:
आचार्यदेवगुरुभूसुरशापदोषैः शोकं च गुल्मरुजमिन्द्रगुरुः करोति ।
कान्ताविकार जनिमेहरुजा सुराद्यैः खेटंगना जनकृतेर्भयमासुरेज्यः ॥

verse_data.sanskrit_text:
आचार्यदेवगुरुभूसुरशापदोषैः शोकं च गुल्मरुजमिन्द्रगुरुः करोति ।
कान्ताविकार जनिमेहरुजा सुराद्यैः खेटंगना जनकृतेर्भयमासुरेज्यः ॥

content_blocks.text:
Jupiter (when malefic) causes sorrow
due to the evil effects of maledictions uttered by precep-
tors, Gods, parents and such other venerable people and
Brahmins, as well as the disease of the spleen.

verse_data.translation:
Jupiter (when malefic) causes sorrow
due to the evil effects of maledictions uttered by precep-
tors, Gods, parents and such other venerable people and
Brahmins, as well as the disease of the spleen.

raw_text:
St. 70-79
द्वितीयोऽध्यायः
85
पाण्डुदोषजलदोषकामिला पीनसादिरमणक्रितामयः ।
कालिकासु रसुवासिनीगणैराकुलं च कुरुते तु चन्द्रमाः ॥ ७६ ॥
Sloka. 76. The Moon (when malefic) causes
trouble by means of diseases generally brought on by
venereal indulgence, such as pallor, catarrh, jaundice
and inflammation of the nose, and also with the aid of
numerous female goblins and demonesser
पीनजिककशस्त्रपावकग्रंथिरुग्ग्रणदारद्रजामयैः ।
वीरशैवगण भैरवादिभिर्भीतिमाशु कुरुते धरासुतः ॥ ७७ ॥
Sloka. 77. Mars (when malefic) quickly causes
fear by a swelling of the scrotum. phlegm, weapons, fire,
knotty tumours, boils and such diseases as are born of
indigence; and also through the instrumentality of
Siva's heroic hosts and the terrific forms of that deity.
गुलोदरादृश्यसमीरकुष्ठमंदानिशूलग्रहणीरुगाद्यैः ।
बुधादिविष्णुप्रियदासभूतैरतीव दुःखं शशिजः करोति ॥ ७८ ॥
Sika 78. Mercury (when malefic) works much
misery by producing wind imperceptibly in the regions
of the privities and the stomach, by bringing on leprosy,
indigestion, colic, diarrhoea and other diseases ; and also
through the instrumentality of spirits, the devoted ser-
vants of Vishnu of whom the leader is called Budha
आचार्यदेवगुरुभूसुरशापदोषैः शोकं च गुल्मरुजमिन्द्रगुरुः करोति ।
कान्ताविकार जनिमेहरुजा सुराद्यैः खेटंगना जनकृतेर्भयमासुरेज्यः ॥
Sloka 7. Jupiter (when malefic) causes sorrow
due to the evil effects of maledictions uttered by precep.
tors, Gods, parents and such other venerable people and
Brahmins, as well as the disease of the spleen.
